current_action_id.description: Start execution from this action ID instead of the trigger. Each test run executes a single node and returns the next action id.

globals.description: Test trigger payload, typically {event, person, groups}.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

mock_async_functions.description: True (default) mocks HTTP/email/SMS. False fires real side effects.

use_draft.description: Test the workflow's staged draft instead of its live config. Requires an open draft; can't be combined with an explicit configuration override.
